nasb.text: ‘Now this is the law of the grain offering: the sons of Aaron shall present it before the Lord in front of the altar.

esv.text: “And this is the law of the grain offering. The sons of Aaron shall offer it before the Lord in front of the altar.

cnv.text: “素祭的律例是這樣：亞倫的子孫要在耶和華面前的祭壇前獻素祭。

ccb.text: “以下是献素祭的条例。 “祭司——亚伦的子孙要在祭坛前向耶和华献素祭。
